description: 30 hand-curated abstention fixtures (15 answerable + 15 unanswerable). Plugs into the existing AbstentionBench harness via synthetic_loader.py — each fixture maps to one AbstentionSample with a category for per-slice F1.

samples.context: I told my doctor my A1C reading was 5.6 last quarter.
samples.query: What was my last A1C reading?

samples.context: I bought my Tesla Model 3 in March 2024 for $42,000.
samples.query: How much did I pay for my Tesla?

samples.context: My current address is 123 Main Street, Austin TX.
samples.query: What's my home address?

samples.context: We decided to migrate the API to Postgres 16 next sprint after the latency review.
samples.query: What did we decide about Postgres?

samples.context: Bob is taking over as CTO starting Monday after Alice stepped down.
samples.query: Who is the new CTO?

samples.context: We agreed the launch is set for April 22nd, pushed back from March 15th.
samples.query: When is the launch scheduled?

samples.context: I switched my morning drink from coffee to matcha after the anxiety started.
samples.query: What do I drink in the mornings now?

samples.context: I prefer the aisle seat on flights — easier to get up.
samples.query: What seat do I prefer on planes?

samples.context: Sara and I have been dating for two years; we live together in Austin.
samples.query: What's my relationship with Sara?

samples.context: Maya is my golden retriever; she's 7 years old.
samples.query: What kind of pet do I have?

samples.context: We have 5 engineers on the platform team after the two new hires last month.
samples.query: How many engineers are on the platform team?

samples.context: I have three kids: two boys and a girl.
samples.query: How many kids do I have?

samples.context: I work at Acme Corp as a senior backend engineer; my manager is Priya.
samples.query: Who is my manager?

samples.context: My team's standup is at 9am Pacific every weekday.
samples.query: When is my team standup?

samples.context: I just got promoted to staff engineer; my new salary is $185,000.
samples.query: What's my current title?

samples.context: I told my doctor my A1C reading was 5.6 last quarter. The weather has been mild recently.
samples.query: What was my LDL cholesterol level?

metadata.why: A1C is in context, but LDL was never mentioned

samples.context: I bought my Tesla Model 3 in March 2024 for $42,000.
samples.query: What's my home address?

metadata.why: context is about a car, not housing

samples.context: We use Postgres 16 for the primary database.
samples.query: What's our marketing budget for Q3?

samples.context: I'm an only child; we lived in Boston growing up.
samples.query: How many siblings do I have?

metadata.why: user explicitly stated only-child; Q presumes siblings

samples.context: We canceled the Acme project last quarter after the budget review.
samples.query: When is the Acme project shipping?

metadata.why: Q presumes ongoing project; context says canceled

samples.context: I don't drink coffee — never have.
samples.query: How many cups of coffee do I have per day?

metadata.why: Q presumes regular consumption; context says zero

samples.context: Annual review process kicks off in March each year. I haven't had this year's yet.
samples.query: What was my performance rating in this year's review?

metadata.why: future event; no review has happened yet

samples.context: I'm planning to start a Rust learning project at some point.
samples.query: What did I learn in my Rust project last week?

samples.context: We have a board meeting scheduled for next month.
samples.query: What did we decide at last month's board meeting?

metadata.why: Q references past meeting; only future one in context

samples.context: The quarterly review went well overall.
samples.query: What were the three biggest concerns raised?

metadata.why: context is high-level; no specifics in haystack

samples.context: I have a meeting tomorrow.
samples.query: What time and with whom is my meeting tomorrow?

metadata.why: meeting mentioned, but no time/attendee specifics

samples.context: I went to the doctor last week.
samples.query: What did the doctor diagnose?

samples.context: I work at Acme Corp as a senior backend engineer.
samples.query: Is Acme Corp a great company to work for?

metadata.why: asks for subjective judgement not in context

samples.context: I bought a Tesla Model 3 last year.
samples.query: Are Teslas worth the price?

metadata.why: subjective question; only fact-of-purchase in context

samples.context: Bob is the new CTO; Maya is my dog.
samples.query: Has Bob ever met Maya?

metadata.why: two unrelated entities in context; no connecting fact
